name: icepay/checkout-sdk
description: ICEPAY PHP SDK for integrating Checkout API.

suggest.symfony/http-client: For using the Symfony HTTP Client as the HTTP client implementation.
suggest.nyholm/psr7: For using Nyholm PSR-7 as the PSR-7 implementation.
suggest.guzzlehttp/guzzle: For using Guzzle as the HTTP client implementation.
suggest.laminas/laminas-diactoros: For using Laminas Diactoros as the PSR-7 implementation.
